message:
feat(tui): Add worker drain/enable controls and state selection API

status_display.rs:
- Add drain_worker(worker_id) to gracefully drain a worker from pool
- Add enable_worker(worker_id) to re-enable a drained worker
- Both functions communicate with daemon via Unix socket
- Include non-Unix fallback stubs for cross-platform compilation

tui/state.rs:
- Add selected_worker() method to get currently selected worker from UI
- Returns Option<&WorkerState> based on panel selection
- Add comprehensive unit tests for selection behavior

tui/app.rs:
- Refactor to integrate new worker control functionality
- Simplify event handling flow

tui/event.rs:
- Add event handling support for worker operations

These changes enable TUI users to interactively manage workers,
draining them before maintenance and re-enabling afterward.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
